recipe.title: Sausage pasta
recipe.description: Easy and healthy sausage pasta from Jamie Oliver's brilliant book Super Food Family Classics. This recipe is a real family favourite crowd-pleaser.

ingredients.name: ½ a bunch of fresh oregano

steps.descr: Chop the broccoli florets off the stalk
steps.instructions: Chop the broccoli florets off the stalk.

on_enter.say: Chop the broccoli florets off the stalk.

steps.descr: Cut the woody end off the stalk, halve the stalk...
steps.instructions: Cut the woody end off the stalk, halve the stalk lengthways and put into a large pan of boiling salted water with the sausages and whole chilli(es).

on_enter.say: Cut the woody end off the stalk, halve the stalk lengthways and put into a large pan of boiling salted water with the sausages and whole chilli(es).

steps.descr: Pop the lid on, boil for 5 minutes, then remove, leaving...
steps.instructions: Pop the lid on, boil for 5 minutes, then remove, leaving the water on the lowest heat.

on_enter.say: Pop the lid on, boil for 5 minutes, then remove, leaving the water on the lowest heat.

steps.descr: Meanwhile, chop the broccoli florets into nice...
steps.instructions: Meanwhile, chop the broccoli florets into nice bite-sized chunks and put aside for later.

on_enter.say: Meanwhile, chop the broccoli florets into nice bite-sized chunks and put aside for later.

steps.descr: Once cool enough to handle, finely slice the sausages,...
steps.instructions: Once cool enough to handle, finely slice the sausages, broccoli stalk and chilli and place in a large frying pan on a medium heat with 1 tablespoon of oil, the fennel seeds and a pinch of sea salt and black pepper.

on_enter.say: Once cool enough to handle, finely slice the sausages, broccoli stalk and chilli and place in a large frying pan on a medium heat with 1 tablespoon of oil, the fennel seeds and a pinch of sea salt and black pepper.

steps.descr: Stir and fry while you peel and finely slice the garlic...
steps.instructions: Stir and fry while you peel and finely slice the garlic and onions.

on_enter.say: Stir and fry while you peel and finely slice the garlic and onions.

steps.descr: Once the sausage is lightly golden, stir in the garlic,...
steps.instructions: Once the sausage is lightly golden, stir in the garlic, followed a minute later by the onions, then pick in the oregano leaves. Cook for 15 minutes, or until softened, stirring occasionally.

on_enter.say: Once the sausage is lightly golden, stir in the garlic, followed a minute later by the onions, then pick in the oregano leaves. Cook for 15 minutes, or until softened, stirring occasionally.

steps.descr: Add the vinegar and cook completely away, then pour in...
steps.instructions: Add the vinegar and cook completely away, then pour in the tomatoes, breaking them up with a wooden spoon. Half-fill the tin with water, swirl around and pour into the pan.

on_enter.say: Add the vinegar and cook completely away, then pour in the tomatoes, breaking them up with a wooden spoon. Half-fill the tin with water, swirl around and pour into the pan.

steps.descr: Simmer for 15 more minutes, or until thickened, then...
steps.instructions: Simmer for 15 more minutes, or until thickened, then taste and season to perfection.

on_enter.say: Simmer for 15 more minutes, or until thickened, then taste and season to perfection.

steps.descr: Meanwhile, bring the pan of water back up to boil, and...
steps.instructions: Meanwhile, bring the pan of water back up to boil, and cook the pasta according to the packet instructions, adding the broccoli florets for the last 4 minutes.

on_enter.say: Meanwhile, bring the pan of water back up to boil, and cook the pasta according to the packet instructions, adding the broccoli florets for the last 4 minutes.

steps.descr: Drain the pasta and broccoli, reserving a mugful of...
steps.instructions: Drain the pasta and broccoli, reserving a mugful of cooking water. Toss through the sauce, loosening with a little reserved water, if needed.

on_enter.say: Drain the pasta and broccoli, reserving a mugful of cooking water. Toss through the sauce, loosening with a little reserved water, if needed.

steps.descr: Finely grate in most of the Parmesan and toss together,...
steps.instructions: Finely grate in most of the Parmesan and toss together, then serve with the rest of the Parmesan grated over the top.

on_enter.say: Finely grate in most of the Parmesan and toss together, then serve with the rest of the Parmesan grated over the top.
